allowed: Textbook, personal notes, lab documentation, Kali VM, Wireshark
tips: Review Labs 3.1–3.3 including your live Azure capture findings
Know CIDR, subnetting, and how to read Wireshark filters
Understand IDS detection models (signature vs. anomaly) and what each catches
timeManagement: Budget ~90 seconds per question. Timer starts on click and cannot be paused.
readyMessage: Make sure you have a stable connection and 45 uninterrupted minutes.
